form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after two months got back early 7th of 13 at this track on March 25 over 1400m, 6 len behind Shadow Castle with 54kg at $24.40. Previously second-up 6th of 12 at this track on September 5 over 1400m, 6 len behind Moriden Stealth carrying 53kg at $19.20. Solid top-three hope.

form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign sixth of 11 at this track December 24 over 1200m, 5 len behind Satono Lilium carrying 54kg at $11.70. Previous preparation first-up won by head this track August 13 over 1200m defeating Sabuno Koigokoro carrying 54kg at $17. Expect she will go well.
